meaning: n.阴谋,诡计vi.密谋,私通vt.激起...的兴趣,用诡计取得
examples: He found himself snared in a web of intrigue.
They spiced their conversations and discussions with intrigue.
The young heroine steps into a web of intrigue in the academic world.
You can see why HS2 adds yet another element of intrigue to the proceedings.
And thus, with intrigue, we must put the Xperia through its paces the Engadget way.
